race.comment: Sydney raider SARRISMO (7) is a consistent conveyance who is yet to miss a drum in seven career outings and looks very well placed against this line-up. Appears to be the runner in this field with the most upside and goes on top despite the wide draw. RAMP IT UP (5) got an overdue victory over this track and trip last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that win. Can go back-to-back without surprising. ECLAIR AWESOME (8) has a handy record over this distance range and will be rock-hard fit for this. Top-three candidate on best figures. KATDEEL (10) is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and is a must for the multiples. BLACKLIST (4) strips fitter second-up from the spell and may earn some minor money.
